case_title: MATTHEW RYAN ADAMS VS. ITRAVEL INC. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ADAMS, MATTHEW RYAN AS TO DEFENDANT ITRAVEL INC. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS ITRAVEL INDIVIDUAL TRAVEL, A FORFEITED DELAWARE CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ADAMS, MATTHEW RYAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ITRAVEL INC. WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA AS ITRAVEL INDIVIDUAL TRAVEL, A FORFEITED DELAWARE CORPORATION $154,095.03 PRINCIPAL, $2,160.15 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $156,705.18, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
